scripts.dev:full: concurrently --names "MERCH,API,IDX,SCORE,WEB" -c "cyan,yellow,blue,magenta,white" "pnpm merchants" "pnpm api" "pnpm indexer" "pnpm scoring" "pnpm web" --delay 2000 --kill-others-on-fail
scripts.start: concurrently --names "MERCH,API,IDX,SCORE,WEB,BUYERS" -c "cyan,yellow,blue,magenta,white,green" "pnpm merchants" "pnpm api" "pnpm indexer" "pnpm scoring" "pnpm web" "pnpm --filter agents buyers" --delay 3000 --kill-others-on-fail
